label: Transparent lotus bloom motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Lotus transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a richly colored pink lotus bloom motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as one complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A graceful pink lotus flower with layered translucent petals in visible lotus pink, rose-pink tips, warm cream petal bases, golden center hints, jade-green lotus leaves, short pond stem, subtle pale aqua water reflections on petal edges, and mud-brown natural grounding details. Botanical accuracy, crisp cutout edges, serene still pond identity. The petals must be colorful pink, not gray, not monochrome, not white.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include bloom, leaf, and stem without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #0000ff blue background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use pure #0000ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no rose, no lily bouquet, no vase, no spa stones, no candle, no landscape, no text, no watermark, no loose petals, no second plant species, no grayscale petals.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Using the Morphous Lotus motif image as the source reference, generate a single extra-large light-mode design-system board.

Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Lotus light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Lotus", derived directly from the pink lotus bloom cutout. This is a source reference for a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible serene wellness UI theme.
Canvas: true 16:9 landscape board, ultra high resolution, 3840 x 2160 composition, large crisp text, no poster border, no tiny writing, no phone mockup. Design the content to fill a wide landscape canvas.
Required visible sections: Morphous Lotus, Pink Lotus Bloom, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract colors and interaction language from the visible lotus pink petals, jade-green leaves, still-water blue reflections, cream petal highlights, mud-brown pond grounding, and soft pond shadows. The board must read as lotus, not rose or generic spa branding.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Japanese UI. Keep text short, large, and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: serene wellness system, 8px radius, petal-cream surfaces, lotus-pink primary actions, jade leaf controls, still-water blue focus rings, mud-brown dividers, pond-silt ink text, layered petal cards, subtle ripple texture, airy spacing.
Constraints: no rose cues, no generic yoga poster, no beige-only palette, no saturated purple gradients, no unrelated neon colors, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Lotus", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Using the Morphous Lotus motif and light design-system board as references, generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board.

Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Lotus dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Lotus". It must feel like the light-mode board translated to dark mode and remain derived from the pink lotus bloom cutout.
Canvas: true 16:9 landscape board, ultra high resolution, 3840 x 2160 composition, large crisp text, no poster border, no tiny writing, no phone mockup. Design the content to fill a wide landscape canvas.
Required visible sections: Morphous Lotus, Pink Lotus Bloom, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve lotus-pink active states, jade leaf controls, still-water blue focus and charts, mud-brown panels and borders, cream text, layered petal rhythm, ripple texture, and 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid. Must read as lotus, not rose or generic wellness.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Japanese UI. Keep text short, large, and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: deep pond-silt dark backgrounds, mud-brown cards, petal-cream foreground, lotus-pink buttons, jade success, still-water blue rings and charts, subtle ripple and petal-vein overlays, restrained contrast, crisp controls.
Constraints: no rose imagery, no candles or spa props, no neon colors, no pure-black flat background, no generic purple/blue gradients, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Lotus".
